q_test1.currentAnswer: No, I found no evidence of a Revolut partnership with any airport lounge in Tel Aviv. Revolut offers lounge access globally through third-party networks such as LoungeKey and DragonPass rather than through a specific Tel Aviv (Ben Gurion) airport lounge partnership.
q_test1.currentSummary: No Revolut–Tel Aviv airport lounge partnership found
